# Verification Evidence

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/agentexecutiondesign -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to Assignment Lifecycle FSM](assignment-lifecycle-fsm.md)

The executable evidence manifest is verified by tools/agentexecutionevidence.

| Risk | Evidence | Proves |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `same-task-multiple-assignments` | `./internal/agentbridge/runtimeactor:TestRuntimeActorUsesAssignmentIDAsExecutionKey` | same logical task_id with distinct assignment ids runs as distinct runtime executions |
| `public-repo-worktree-materialization` | `./internal/agentbridge/supervisor:TestMaterializeAssignmentWorktreeRunsShallowBranchClone` | public GitHub repo and branch are shallow cloned into daemon-selected workdir |
| `private-repo-fail-closed` | `./internal/agentbridge/supervisor:TestSupervisorBlocksPrivateAssignmentWorktreeBeforeProviderStart` | private or unsupported worktree is blocked before provider process start |
| `async-workspace-preparation` | `./internal/agentbridge/supervisor:TestSupervisorHeartbeatContinuesDuringWorkspaceMaterialization` | slow workspace materialization does not block supervisor heartbeat |
| `restart-recovery-refuses-fresh-start` | `./internal/agentbridge/controlplane/saasplane:TestPlaneFailsActiveAssignmentWithoutSessionAfterLocalStateLoss` | active assignment without provider session id fails recovery instead of starting from scratch |
| `restart-recovery-provider-session-resume` | `./internal/agentbridge/controlplane/saasplane:TestPlaneClaimsActiveAssignmentAfterLocalStateLoss` | active assignment with provider session id is claimed with resume session |
| `cancellation-watcher-release` | `./internal/agentbridge/supervisor:TestSupervisorCancelsCancellationWatchAfterTaskCompletion` | terminal task path releases cancellation watcher lifetime |
| `launch-path-freeze` | `./internal/agentbridge/runtimeactor:TestRuntimeActorPassesDetectedExecutableToBuildStartAndSpawn` | detected executable and frozen launch PATH reach provider build and process spawn |
| `capability-ttl-redetect` | `./internal/agentbridge/runtimeactor:TestRuntimeActorRefreshesUnavailableCapabilityAfterTTL` | unavailable provider capability is re-detected after TTL instead of staying permanently cached |
| `transient-poll-retry` | `./internal/agentbridge/controlplane/saasplane:TestPlaneRetriesTransientPoll` | poll retries transient server failure |
| `transient-agent-bindings-retry` | `./internal/agentbridge/controlplane/saasplane:TestPlaneRetriesTransientAgentBindings` | agent binding lookup retries transient server failure |
| `transient-heartbeat-retry` | `./internal/agentbridge/controlplane/saasplane:TestPlaneRetriesTransientHeartbeat` | heartbeat retries transient server failure |
| `transient-runtime-snapshot-retry` | `./internal/agentbridge/controlplane/saasplane:TestPlaneRetriesTransientRuntimeSnapshot` | runtime snapshot push retries transient server failure |
| `permanent-poll-no-retry` | `./internal/agentbridge/controlplane/saasplane:TestPlaneDoesNotRetryPermanentPollFailure` | permanent poll failure is not retried |
| `idempotent-event-post-retry` | `./internal/agentbridge/controlplane/saasplane:TestPlaneRetriesTransientEventPostWithIdempotencyKey` | event POST retry is allowed only when idempotency metadata exists |
| `stale-pid-kill-refusal` | `./cmd/riido:TestDaemonStopRejectsNonDaemonPidFile` | daemon stop refuses stale pid fallback without daemon identity evidence |
| `headless-tool-risk-fail-closed` | `./internal/agentbridge/toolpolicy:TestPolicyToolStartGateBlocksClassifiedRiskWithoutApprovalPath` | classified tool start fails closed when no approval path is available |
| `windows-stale-claim-recovery` | `./internal/lock:TestReclaimStaleLockClaimRemovesOldClaim` | old daemon lock claims can be reclaimed |
| `windows-fresh-claim-retained` | `./internal/lock:TestReclaimStaleLockClaimKeepsFreshClaim` | fresh daemon lock claims are retained |
| `workspace-prepare-cancel-fence` | `./internal/agentbridge/supervisor:TestSupervisorCancellationDuringWorkspacePrepareStopsBeforeRuntimeStart` | cancellation during workspace preparation stops before provider runtime start |
| `generated-fsm-daemon-consumption` | `./internal/contractscompat:TestContractsBaseline` | daemon consumes contracts generated assignment and task FSM service providers |
| `web-approval-contract-consumption` | `./internal/contractscompat:TestContractsBaseline` | daemon consumes contracts tool approval timeout status and decision vocabulary |
| `web-approval-session-resolver` | `./internal/agentbridge/session:TestSessionResolverApprovalWritesProviderInput` | session approval resolver decisions are converted into provider approve commands without falling through to the headless gate |
| `web-approval-round-trip` | `./internal/agentbridge/controlplane/saasplane:TestResolveToolApprovalCreatesAndWaitsForDecision` | SaaS plane creates a control-plane tool approval and waits for the client decision before returning a provider-neutral approval resolution |
| `private-repo-url-redaction` | `riido-control-plane:TestStoreActorDropsSensitiveAssignmentWorktreeURL` | control-plane store actor drops sensitive assignment worktree URL |
| `active-stream-handoff` | `riido-control-plane:TestHTTPAIAgentClientDevelopmentV2WorkspaceScopedCreateAndThreadStream` | task action response can hand client an active stream link |
| `terminal-late-progress-fence` | `riido-control-plane:TestC2LateRuntimeProgressDoesNotReactivateStoppedThread` | late runtime progress cannot reactivate stopped task thread projection |
| `generated-fsm-conformance` | `riido-contracts:TestVerifyGeneratedFSMFiles` | contracts fsmgen verifies generated FSM drift and conformance from Common Lisp metadata |
| `web-approval-contract` | `riido-contracts:TestAssignmentContractToolApprovalWireShape` | contracts owns the tool approval request/decision/result DTO wire shape |
